div.style: width: 100%; height: 100%; position: relative; overflow: hidden;

position: absolute; right: -10%; bottom: -20%; width: 1200px; height: 1200px; background: #4c1d95; opacity: 0.10; -webkit-mask: url(/obrazek.png) center/contain no-repeat; mask: url(/obrazek.png) center/contain no-repeat; transform: rotate(-15deg);
